title: hypericum × reinosae
intro: Hypericum × reinosae, also known as St. John's Wort, is a flowering plant that is a hybrid of Hypericum andrewsii and Hypericum canadense. It has been used for centuries for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral compounds. The health benefits of Hypericum × reinosae include reducing stress and anxiety, improving mood, and alleviating symptoms of mild depression. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and capsules, and is often used as an alternative treatment for various health conditions.
